message.content:
Here are example statements a 14-year-old might say on a hotline, clearly indicating sexual abuse without graphic detail. You can adapt wording to fit your training style and local context.

1. “I’m 14 and my mom’s boyfriend keeps touching me in ways I don’t want. He waits until she’s at work and then comes into my room and makes me sit on his lap and touches my body under my clothes. I’ve told him to stop, but he just laughs and says it’s our ‘little secret.’”

2. “My uncle stays over a lot and when everyone’s asleep he comes into my room. He makes me lie next to him and he touches me in places I know he shouldn’t. If I move away, he grabs me harder. He tells me no one will believe me if I say anything.”

3. “There’s this coach at my school who always wants to be alone with me after practice. He makes comments about my body and sometimes puts his hands where they shouldn’t be when he’s ‘showing me stretches.’ He told me if I tell anyone, I’ll get kicked off the team.”

4. “My dad keeps coming into the bathroom when I’m showering and won’t leave when I ask him to. At night he comes into my bed and starts touching me in private areas. He says it’s just how he shows he loves me, but it makes me feel sick and scared.”

5. “My older cousin is 19 and when I sleep over at their house, he makes me share his bed. He won’t let me sleep unless I let him touch me under my clothes. He tells me I’d get in trouble too if anyone found out because I didn’t push him away hard enough.”

6. “A man my mom met online moved in with us, and now he keeps trying to kiss me and touch my chest and between my legs. He tells me I’m ‘mature for my age’ and says if I tell my mom, he’ll say I started it.”

7. “There’s this neighbor who gives me rides home from school. At first he was just nice, but now he pulls over in empty places and makes me sit really close and puts his hands on my thighs and under my shirt. He said if I say no again, he won’t drive me home and my parents will be mad at me.”

8. “My stepbrother is in college and whenever our parents go out, he comes into my room and locks the door. He makes me touch him and he touches me even when I’m crying and telling him to stop. He told me if I say anything the whole family will fall apart and it will be my fault.”

9. “My teacher messages me late at night on social media. He keeps asking me for pictures of myself without many clothes and says he’ll ‘help my grades’ if I send them. He already touched me once after class when no one was around and I froze. I’m scared he’s going to do it again.”

10. “My mom’s friend babysits me sometimes, and when we’re alone he makes me sit really close to him on the couch. He puts his hands under my shirt and tries to put my hand on him. I told my mom I don’t like him, but she just says I’m being rude.”

11. “My grandpa calls me his ‘special girl’ and makes me sit on his lap. He puts his hands between my legs and on my chest. When I tried to get up once, he held me there and said I’d hurt his feelings if I told anyone.”

12. “There’s a guy who’s 21 that I met in an online game. He keeps asking me to video chat and wants me to take off my clothes on camera. He sends me pictures of himself without clothes and says we’re ‘dating’ now and I should do it to prove I love him.”

13. “My mom drinks a lot and when her new boyfriend comes over, he waits until she passes out. Then he comes into my room and lies next to me and starts touching me under my clothes. He says if I scream, he’ll hurt my little brother.”

14. “My band director offers to give me ‘extra lessons’ alone after school. He closes the door, stands behind me, and puts his hands all over me while pretending to fix how I’m holding the instrument. I feel trapped and gross, but he told me not to ‘overreact’ or I could lose my solo.”

15. “My cousin keeps trying to watch videos with sex stuff in them when I’m over. Then he tries to copy what he saw and makes me do things with him. I tell him no and try to leave, but he blocks the door and says everyone will think I wanted it.”

These can be used as role
